overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring a character walking through hazy, smog-filled streets bathed in orange light and neon signage. The environment shows heavy atmospheric pollution with holographic advertisements on towering buildings, wet reflective sidewalks, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city sidewalk with vending machines and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing futuristic vending machines and trees while following other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character with red hair and backpack walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: futuristic purple vending machine with bright yellow beverage advertisements
large concrete planter containing a mature tree with green foliage
tall digital screen displaying '11:11' in green and red neon
floating holographic advertisements projected on the facades of distant skyscrapers
tall black street lamps with multiple fixtures lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy, neon-lit city street at dusk. The camera follows a character with red hair walking along a wet concrete sidewalk. To the right, a purple vending machine and large tree planters line the path, while the left side shows a street with parked futuristic vehicles and towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The atmosphere is thick with orange smog, and the pavement reflects the ambient neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered walkway between buildings with stairs

events.description: character ascends concrete stairs into a narrow covered passage between buildings

agents.ego_description: climbing a flight of concrete stairs and proceeding through a narrow alleyway between tall buildings

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward between building walls
tall plain concrete wall of adjacent building forming a narrow corridor
suspended digital billboard displaying text and symbols above the passage
cyan neon sign with Japanese characters reading 'その目で未来を'

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open street into a narrow, enclosed walkway by ascending a flight of concrete stairs. The environment becomes darker and more confined, with tall building walls on either side creating a canyon-like effect. An overhead digital sign and cyan Japanese neon signage become visible ahead as the character moves through this sheltered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city boulevard with holographic advertisements and traffic signals

events.description: exits narrow passage back onto main street with wider view of futuristic architecture

agents.ego_description: continuing along the main sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and approaching a major intersection

notable_agents.action: person with backpack walking in same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and horizontal neon lighting strips
massive cylindrical building covered in vertical holographic advertisements and cyan light strips
tall pole with horizontal traffic signal arms showing green lights
bright yellow hanging banner with black text and symbols

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens back onto the main city boulevard. The character walks past a futuristic glass building with horizontal neon strips on the right, while a massive cylindrical tower covered in holographic advertisements dominates the left skyline. The sidewalk continues straight toward a major intersection, with traffic lights and various pedestrians sharing the path. The orange hazy atmosphere persists, creating a dystopian cyberpunk ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and towering mega-structures

events.description: approaching crosswalk at intersection with traffic light showing green
stepping onto yellow-striped crosswalk and beginning to cross the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection via the marked crosswalk, moving toward the towering buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving through the intersection perpendicular to the crosswalk

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes
massive futuristic skyscraper with curved glass facade and giant holographic face projection

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character reaching a major intersection and stepping onto a wide crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes. A massive mega-building with a curved glass facade and giant holographic projections looms ahead, dominating the skyline. The traffic light shows green as pedestrians cross, and a futuristic vehicle passes on the right. The camera continues forward across the street, maintaining the dystopian orange-hued atmosphere throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a smog-filled cyberpunk district that transitions from a neon-lit sidewalk into a confined passage before opening onto a massive urban intersection. It begins by following a red-haired character along a wet concrete path lined with purple vending machines and holographic advertisements, all bathed in a thick orange haze. As the character ascends a flight of concrete stairs, the environment shifts into a dark, narrow walkway where towering walls create a canyon-like effect under cyan Japanese signage. The scene then expands back onto a main boulevard, passing a glass building with neon strips and a dominant cylindrical tower before approaching a bustling city crossing. Finally, the camera moves across a wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward a looming mega-building with curved glass and giant holographic projections under the persistent dystopian glow.
